sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) AS cohort_year, CASE status WHEN 'A' THEN 'finished OK' WHEN 'B' THEN 'finished default' WHEN 'C' THEN 'running OK' WHEN 'D' THEN 'running in debt' END AS loan_status, COUNT(*) AS loan_count FROM loan GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; SELECT duration AS duration_bucket_months, CASE status WHEN 'A' THEN 'finished OK' WHEN 'B' THEN 'finished default' WHEN 'C' THEN 'running OK' WHEN 'D' THEN 'running in debt' END AS loan_status, AVG(amount) AS avg_loan_amount FROM loan GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_approved_amount_1998 FROM loan WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE))=1998;

charts.title: Loan Count by Status and Approval Cohort
Average Loan Amount by Duration and Status

filters: all-time for status and duration charts
chart_spec.layout_intent: Aging dashboard with KPI header, cohort status stack as main chart, and duration-status matrix below.
